_comment: Single source of truth for move-classification constants. Loaded by server/app/analysis.py and bundled into the client via client/src/lib/classification.ts — edit here, never in the consumers. Threshold upper bounds are exclusive centipawn loss from the mover's perspective: loss < 10 is best, 10-24 good, etc.; at or past the last bound is a blunder. The server's test_classification.py pins the canonical values.
